svg.title: Curio - Dataset Detail Inspector (Simplified)
svg.desc: Simplified dataset inspector for chicago_buildings.geojson. Tabs: Overview, Schema, Table Preview, Lineage. Map Preview, Distribution and Quality tabs removed. Data Quality section removed from right panel. Installed badge + Publish to Hub action in header. Lineage tab = simple list of dataflows that generate/consume. Visual identity: Rubik, #1E1F23, #FBAA69.

g.text: Dataflows that generate or consume this dataset
